result:
**Goal: Add a Volcanic Eruption & Lava Flow simulation mode.**

The last three additions form an earth-science trilogy (tectonic plates → atmospheric weather → ocean currents). A volcanic eruption simulator is the natural next piece — it bridges tectonics and atmosphere with magma chamber pressure buildup, eruption events, lava flows using fluid dynamics over terrain, pyroclastic density currents, ash particle dispersion, and terrain deformation as lava cools into new rock. Visually it'd be one of the most dramatic ASCII renders in the collection.

Want me to build it?
